title: Hadoop MapReduce Committer Stage Directory
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest/stages' directory in Hadoop MapReduce manages job stages. 'AbstractJobOrTaskStage.java' ensures single execution and tracks durations. 'JobOrTaskStage.java' defines interfaces for stages. 'LoadManifestsStage.java' processes task manifests. These components collaborate in commit protocol, ensuring data consistency and integrity, exemplifying a layered architecture pattern.
